groups.title: Inspect & Debug Agents
groups.description: See what Claude Code is doing: session context-window reports and memory.

groups.title: Coding Workflows
groups.description: Coding workflow patterns: product taste for what to build, scaffolding new projects, writing pull requests and issues.

groups.title: Communication
groups.description: Communication style in both directions: how the agent writes output a human will read, and how a human writes instructions the agent will execute.
